chunks.title: Initial Examination of Skin Infection
chunks.reason: Establishes the procedure for a priest to examine a swelling or scab and determine isolation periods.

chunks.title: Diagnosis of Chronic Leprosy
chunks.reason: Defines criteria for chronic leprosy and the specific conditions under which a person is pronounced clean or unclean.

chunks.title: Leprosy in Boils
chunks.reason: Outlines the examination process for a healed boil that develops a bright spot.

chunks.title: Leprosy in Burns
chunks.reason: Describes the protocol for examining a burn that develops a reddish-white bright spot.

chunks.title: Leprosy of the Head or Beard
chunks.reason: Details the examination and isolation process for a scaly infection on the head or beard.

chunks.title: Bright Spots and Baldness
chunks.reason: Distinguishes between eczema and leprosy in cases of faded white spots or infection on a bald head.

chunks.title: Appearance of the Leprous Man
chunks.reason: Specifies the clothing and behavior required for a person declared unclean with leprosy.

chunks.title: Leprosy in Garments and Leather
chunks.reason: Provides the complete procedure for examining, isolating, washing, or burning garments affected by a leprous mark.
